mapper.select: SELECT o.*, u.name as user_name, c.name as course_name FROM course_order o LEFT JOIN user u ON o.user_id = u.id LEFT JOIN course c ON o.course_id = c.id ORDER BY o.create_time DESC
SELECT o.*, u.name as user_name, c.name as course_name FROM course_order o LEFT JOIN user u ON o.user_id = u.id LEFT JOIN course c ON o.course_id = c.id WHERE o.id = #{id}

SELECT o.*, u.name as user_name, c.name as course_name FROM course_order o LEFT JOIN user u ON o.user_id = u.id LEFT JOIN course c ON o.course_id = c.id WHERE o.user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY o.create_time DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO course_order (order_no, user_id, course_id, price, status) VALUES (#{orderNo}, #{userId}, #{courseId}, #{price}, #{status})
